items.headline: Arista Networks (ANET) Fell ~14% After Q1 2026 Earnings and Guidance Update
Arista Networks (ANET) Q1 2026 Results: Revenue $2.709B, Up 35.1% YoY; Q2 2026 Guidance Issued
Analysts Reassess Arista Networks (ANET) Valuation After Q1 2026 Earnings and AI Product Updates; Stock Seen as Overvalued at ~$141 vs $127 Fair Value
